title: The Times They Are A-Changin' (Fragmented)
key: G major (modal, microtonal bends ~1/4 tone throughout)
notes: DCA arr. after Bob Dylan. Score: ~/projects/assets/scores/Claude-Adams_The-Times-They.pdf. Five continuous sections. Timings approximate — follow energy. Microtonal bends consistently 'off' in same direction (1/4 tone-ish). The Void (IV) is a HARD STOP — DCA nods, all cut simultaneously, 4 beats silence ~60 BPM.

perform.bass: Long tones with volume swells — bowed quality. Start G2, sustain/fade, re-enter D2. No rhythm, no pulse. By 1:00: G–D–B fragments, 4–8s each. Gentle 1/4-tone scoops into notes from below.
perform.guitar: DCA: clean tremolo on natural harmonics (12th/7th/5th fret). Single note, add gradually. Open-string drones by 1:00. DETUNE G string ~10 cents flat if possible. | AIDAN: enter at 1:00 — single notes widely spaced, modal G fragments, pointillistic. Occasional 1/4-tone bends on harmonics.
perform.all: Texture, not time. ppp → p. DCA whispers fragments: 'come' ... 'round you' ... 'grown' ... 'admit' ... 'soon'. Transition to II is organic — Zach introduces pulse, others follow.

perform.bass: Descending glissandi. Start G2, gliss down. Next rep start F#2, etc. Molto vibrato → non-vibrato at bottom. Getting lower each rep by 3:00. TEXT (low register): 'Sink like a stone' — repeat with descending pitch each time.
perform.guitar: DCA: sustained tones via looper/sustain pedal. One note at a time, bloom. TEXT: scatter 'the • times • they • are • a • chan • gin'' syllabically OUT OF ORDER. Density increases toward 3:00. | AIDAN: persistent pattern in perfect 4ths, ~60 BPM eigths → ~100 by end. 4ths go slightly wide (~1/4 tone) as tempo increases.
perform.drums: PULSE BEGINS HERE. Hi-hat only, quarter notes, ~70 BPM, very light. Add: kick on 1 → snare ghosts → fuller. By 3:00: full kit, moderate energy. Feel: slightly behind the beat, heavy, gravitational (Portishead).
perform.all: p → mf. Modules introduced one by one 1:30–2:30, all four simultaneously 2:30–3:30. Energy keeps building → Collision. No break.

perform.bass: Low register rumble. Fast repeated notes. Growl. Distortion welcome.
perform.guitar: DCA: distortion (Gray Channel). Riff fragments, noise. Voice: shout syllable fragments — step on each other. | AIDAN: 4ths at max speed, 1/4-tone wide, tremolo picking, edge into noise.
perform.drums: Full blast. Fills. Build toward the cliff. Loudest and most intense moment.
perform.all: mf → fff. Maximum density — WATCH DCA for the nod. On nod: everyone stops SIMULTANEOUSLY.
EVERYONE STOPS SIMULTANEOUSLY on DCA nod. Count 4 beats internally at ~60 BPM. DO NOT RUSH BACK IN. The silence is the point. After 4th beat: DCA begins Section V alone.

perform.bass: WAIT. Enter only when verse reaches 'the order is rapidly fadin'' OR DCA gives visual cue (nod/look). Then: gently — single bass note, build from there.
perform.guitar: DCA: whispered then sung, one verse Dylan — tender, open. Clean arpegg G–C–D. Simple open voicings. Very slow strum or fingerpick. | AIDAN: WAIT for cue.
perform.drums: WAIT for cue. Enter with: single cymbal swell.
perform.all: pp. DCA alone until V-B cue. Band enters gently at 'the order is rapidly fadin''.

perform.bass: Root–5th pattern. Lock with kick drum. Foundation, solid, relentless. Follow chord chart.
perform.guitar: DCA: G–C–D arpegg/strum. Chord chart below. BENDS: on 'grown' and 'bone' bend 3rd of D up ~1/4 tone; on 'changin'' add wide vibrato wobble. | AIDAN: same chords, lock with DCA — two guitars = one wall.
perform.drums: Driving but not loud. Build through the verse.
perform.all: Chord chart: G Am C D / G Am C D / Am C G D / Am D G / D/F# G C D / G C D G. BENDS: 'grown'/'bone' = D chord 3rd up ~1/4 tone. 'changin'' = bass bends G root up slightly.

perform.bass: Driving root–5th. Lock with kick. Relentless.
perform.guitar: DCA: power chords, riff emerges. Voice: 'For the times they are a-changin'' full voice, repeated, increasingly free and intense. | AIDAN: power chords, 1/4-tone bends on 3rd. Lock with DCA — wall of sound.
perform.drums: Stadium energy. Crashes. Driving quarter notes on floor tom. Fills into each vamp repeat. CLIMAX of the whole piece.
perform.all: ff. Vamp repeats. END CUE: DCA raises guitar neck = LAST TIME THROUGH. Tag final G. Let it ring. Breathe. → Next piece.
